title: Skill Journal Entry
description: A single logged session entry for skill mining. Append one per substantive session to skill-journal.jsonl.

summary.description: One-line description of what was accomplished

action.description: Verb: scaffold, validate, generate, transform, register, test, document, export, migrate, review

target.description: What was acted on (e.g., 'engine adapter', 'preset files', 'parameter IDs')

tool.description: Tool or script used, if any (e.g., 'validate_presets.py', 'manual')

repeatable.description: Could this step be automated or templated?

steps.description: Ordered list of steps taken during the session

tools_used.description: Scripts, commands, or tools invoked during the session

context_loaded.description: Context files, docs, or specs that were read to complete the task

context_gaps.description: Information you had to hunt for or re-explain. Signals missing context slices.

friction_points.description: Anything that slowed you down, required manual intervention, or felt repetitive
